subject: GRB 160611A: GCN19525 OT is known star
submitter: Vladimir Lipunov at Moscow State U/Krylov Obs  <lipunov@xray.sai.msu.ru>
body:
V. Lipunov (MASTER, LMSU)


The OT wich published in GCN 19525 is the result
  of the false identification.
I am sorry for my mistake.

The message may be cited.
